title: Block 2 Review -- The Board Meeting
subtitle: Block 2 Review -- run a full board meeting in English
menu_desc: All Block 2 structures -- chairing, debating, negotiating, handling objections
welcome: This is the review lesson for Block 2. You put Lessons 6-9 together into one board meeting: chair it, present, debate a decision, negotiate terms, and handle objections -- using imperatives, sequencing, and the first, second and third conditionals.
